person_name: Hierocles, imperial favorite and official under Elagabalus
person_name_full: Hierocles, imperial favorite and official under Elagabalus
notes: Imperial favorite and official under Emperor Elagabalus, known for his shamelessness and plotting.

docs.title: BOOK XXIX
docs.author: Ammianus Marcellinus
docs.excerpt: … his son, a youth of most amiable disposition of having been guilty of poisoning, on the unsupported information of a low fellow named Diogenes, who had been tortured with extreme severity to force him to make confessions which might please the emperor, or rather, which might

docs.title: Life of Elagabalus
docs.author: Historia Augusta (anonymous)
docs.excerpt: … demanding back Hierocles, that most shameless of men, and daily increased his plotting against Alexander. 5 Finally, on the Kalends of January, he refused to appear in public with his cousin⁠ 65 " for they had been designated joint consuls.
